prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第53名持续上升至2026年第44名，近年排名稳步提升 ，学校综合实力和认可度增强；2025年声誉评价偏负面（投档线异常），2026年偏负面（学校管理/校园安全类舆情），但负面事件多为舆情管理类，未出现严 重学术或师德危机；抖音热度总排名第8（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与郑州大学招生专业高度契合，对理科考生吸引力较强；四川省2 025年物理类考生约28.5万人，2026年总考生约53.5万人，按近年物理类占比约61.5%估算，2026年物理类考生约32.9万人，较2025年增长约15.5%，竞争显著加剧；郑州大学位于河南郑州，距四川较近，跨省报考交通便利；该校在四川招生规模较大（物理类86–90人），属于省外重点高校在川招生大户， 地域接受度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次27315、2026年扩招约4.7%（位次数字增大方向）与四川省物理类考生增长约15.5%（位次数字增大方向）的双向作用，扩 招部分抵消考生增长带来的竞争压力，但考生规模增幅远大于扩招幅度，整体竞争加剧；结合软科排名持续上升（吸引力增强）与抖音高热关注度，预计2026年最低录取位次在20 25年基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约28277名，区间27777–28777名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 21695 → 20393 → 29392 → 17563 → 27315, with significant fluctuations. In 2023 and 2024, rankings rebounded sharply to 17563, then fell back to 27315 in 2025. Over the past three years, rankings have shifted backward by approximately 5900 positions, with a baseline ranking of about 27315 in 2025. From 2021 to 2024, the science enrollment plan was 80–83 students, increasing to 86 in 2025 for Physics Category, and to 90 in 2026, an expansion of about 4.7% compared to 2025, slightly easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, with consistent improvement in recent years, enhancing overall strength and recognition. In 2025, reputation evaluation was slightly negative (abnormal admission cutoffs), and in 2026, it was slightly negative (school management/campus safety related public opinion), but negative events were mostly about public opinion management, with no serious academic or teacher ethics crises. Douyin popularity ranked 8th overall (high heat), with significant exposure on short video platforms, attracting considerable application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering maintain high social heat, closely matching Zhengzhou University's enrollment majors, strongly attracting science candidates. In 2025, Sichuan had about 285,000 Physics Category candidates; in 2026, total candidates are about 535,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 329,000 (based on recent proportion of about 61.5%), an increase of about 15.5% from 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Zhengzhou University is located in Zhengzhou, Henan, relatively close to Sichuan, facilitating cross-province application transportation. The university has a large enrollment scale in Sichuan (86–90 Physics Category students), making it a major out-of-province key university in Sichuan, with high regional acceptance.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the combined effects of the 2025 baseline ranking of 27315, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 4.7% (ranking number increasing direction), and the Sichuan Physics Category candidate growth of about 15.5% (ranking number increasing direction), the expansion partially offsets competitive pressure from candidate growth, but the candidate scale increase far exceeds the expansion, intensifying overall competition. Combined with the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (increased attractiveness) and high Douyin attention, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward from 2025. Predicted minimum ranking: about 28277, with a range of 27777–28777.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 27777–28777, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., below 27777), you can focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors like Clinical Medicine and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper bound (e.g., above 28777), you should primarily rely on Tier 3 majors for safety and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.
